## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Datagrid to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pruning list needs more context; GrowthX to provide narrative analysis on why specific content should be unpublished](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Context artifacts doc shared for review, focusing on elevator pitch, product overview, and audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Industry prioritization discussed: construction, engineering, government, public sector, transportation, logistics, investment management, manufacturing, and real estate are top priorities](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Balance needed in AI content: technical enough for authority, but digestible for non-technical audience](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

## Topics

### Content Pruning Strategy

  - [Large list of content to be unpublished for performance improvement](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Kaitlin requested more context and keywords to streamline the pruning process](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Mara to provide a condensed narrative explaining determining factors (e.g., sessions, performance, duplicative content)](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Analysis will be placed alongside recommendations for highest-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

### Context Artifacts Review

  - [Document shared containing guardrails for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Key sections: elevator pitch, product overview, use cases, main industries, audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Kaitlin to review and provide input, especially on audience personas and industries](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Four current audience personas; seeking feedback on accuracy and potential emerging personas](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Industry Prioritization

  - [Top priority industries: construction, engineering, government, public sector, transportation, logistics, investment management, manufacturing, real estate](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Secondary focus: operational aspects (sales, finance, CS) applicable across industries](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Insurance identified as potential top-of-mind industry](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Mining companies could potentially be excluded](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### AI Content Strategy

  - [Competitors producing deep technical content on LLMs and model fine-tuning](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Decision to create a mix of technical and digestible AI content](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Technical content builds authority and serves technically-inclined readers](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Digestible content needed for non-technical audience to join the conversation](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [AI topics viewed as educational and adjacent to core functions for most Datagrid buyers](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to provide narrative analysis on pruning list, explaining why specific content should be unpublished](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Kaitlin to review context artifacts document and provide feedback, especially on audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate balanced AI content strategy: technical for authority, digestible for broader audience](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Mara to revise and share performance update for async review](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Follow-up on whether Tiago signed the updated agreement](https://fathom.video/share/EAzeHuRo3dRnGXSAGwEsdptMg_wRx5h-?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
